_comment: Canonical frozen input vector for cross-substrate bit-identity. Every surface (C / Python / Swift / .mind) must fold THESE exact Q16.16 integers to the same raw output. This is the apples-to-apples determinism target — earlier 'bit-identical' passes each agreed with themselves on a different input.
note: Single-node vector. Decision-level (A/B arbitration) proof requires a second frozen vector for Node-B.
